hero.title: UAE's Premier Platform for Commercial-Scale Industrial 3D Printing
hero.lede: We bridge the gap between ambitious design and architectural reality — local, agile LFAM manufacturing at commercial scale across the UAE built environment.

facility.label: FACILITY
facility.title: See LFAM in Production
facility.lede: Facility tours are part of our four-step engagement from initial briefing through technical capability profile access.

testimonials.t1quote: ELM delivered exactly the LFAM capability we needed technical depth, commercial discipline, and on-site execution aligned with our programme.
testimonials.t2quote: From design intent through fabrication, ELM's team integrated seamlessly with our consultants and kept the LFAM programme on track.
testimonials.t3quote: Commercial-scale 3D printing is only valuable when it ships to site ELM understood that from day one and delivered production-ready components.
testimonials.t4quote: Robotic concrete LFAM at architectural scale executed with European engineering standards and UAE delivery discipline.

meta.title: Who We Are
meta.description: ELM Media Design delivers industrial 3D printing at architectural scale in Dubai, UAE.

header.title: WHO WE ARE
header.subtitle: Commercial large-format additive manufacturing for the UAE built environment

who-we-are.introLede1: ELM Media Design is a Dubai-based company. We do large-format additive manufacturing — industrial 3D printing at architectural scale — for developers, hospitality groups, government clients and the built environment at large.
who-we-are.introLede2: Our leadership combines expertise in urban advertising and advanced engineering — delivering landmark structures that were previously considered impossible through local, agile manufacturing that matches the UAE's architectural ambition.
who-we-are.techLede1: Industrial robotic systems extrude polymer or concrete layer by layer, building components without the moulds, formwork and tooling conventional fabrication cannot do without. It is genuinely different to anything else in this market.
who-we-are.techLede2: Robotic precision, digital-first design and on-demand production — one platform logic across concrete, polymer and end-to-end architectural manufacturing.
who-we-are.originLede1: We started ELM Media Design because the UAE was ready for this. Dubai has already mandated it. Yet there was no specialist company here doing it properly — at commercial grade, with the delivery discipline serious clients require.
who-we-are.originLede2: That gap is what we are here to close.
who-we-are.visionLede1: We want large-format additive manufacturing to become the standard choice for anyone building something ambitious in the UAE — not an exotic option that takes months of convincing to reach a tender list.
who-we-are.visionLede2: Every project we deliver should make the next client's decision easier. The technology speaks for itself once people see it. Our job is to show what it looks like in the real world.
who-we-are.verticalsLede: Construction, hospitality and government — each with distinct LFAM requirements.
who-we-are.vertical1Copy: Dubai 2030 mandate. Features, formworks and on-site structures in days.
who-we-are.vertical2Copy: Custom interiors at hotel speed. Late changes are file updates.
who-we-are.vertical3Copy: Compliance-first. Service buildings, urban furniture and monuments.

meta.title: Our Story
meta.description: How ELM Media Design was founded to close the UAE LFAM capability gap.

header.title: OUR STORY
header.subtitle: From European LFAM expertise to UAE commercial capability

our-story.slide2019: European LFAM track record established landmark retail and infrastructure projects including Recarlo Milan and Bergamo Airport components.
our-story.slide2022: UAE market analysis identifies accelerating demand for commercial-scale 3D printing aligned with Dubai's construction transformation agenda.
our-story.slide2023: ELM Media Design concept formed bridging European LFAM engineering depth with Dubai-based execution for regional developers and government.
our-story.slide2024: Partnership development, capability profiling and facility planning to support UAE commercial programmes at architectural scale.
our-story.slide2025: Technical team assembly, material qualification and pilot project pipeline across hospitality, real estate and government sectors.
our-story.slide2026: Commercial LFAM operations in Dubai robotic concrete and polymer 3D printing with 72-hour RFQ response and ICV-aligned delivery.
our-story.policyLede1: Dubai's 3D Printing Strategy 2030 mandates 25% of new buildings to incorporate additive manufacturing. Combined with Net Zero 2050, Dubai 2040 urban planning and ICV requirements, the market needs partners who deliver at scale not in a lab.
our-story.policyLede2: ELM exists to be that partner: authoritative, commercially disciplined, and technically credible.

meta.title: Why ELM
meta.description: Agile manufacturing, sustainability up to 60% waste reduction and CO₂-absorbing curing plus Dubai 2030, Industrial Strategy 2031 and ICV alignment.

header.title: WHY ELM
header.subtitle: What sets commercial LFAM apart from conventional construction and small-scale 3D printing

why-elm.diffLede: On every metric that actually matters in a procurement decision, LFAM wins — often by a significant margin. Not because it is new. Because it is better.
why-elm.diffItem1: Robotic concrete and polymer at architectural scale
why-elm.diffItem4: UAE Industrial Strategy 2031 LFAM as advanced industrial vertical
why-elm.diffItem5: ICV licensing in progress pathway to state tender qualification
why-elm.diffItem6: Sustainability: up to 60% waste reduction and CO₂-absorbing lime mortar curing
why-elm.diffFootnote: Global LFAM proof points via Caracol AM and WASP platforms Recarlo Milan retail panels and Bergamo Airport service module.
why-elm.missionTitle: Built for Site, Not the Portfolio
why-elm.missionLede1: To make large-format additive manufacturing a credible, commercially viable construction method in the UAE enabling architects and developers to build faster, with less waste, and with forms that conventional methods cannot economically produce.
why-elm.missionLede2: We measure success by components installed on site, not renders in a portfolio.
why-elm.visionLede1: To be the UAE's reference partner for industrial 3D printing in the built environment the name programme directors specify when LFAM must work at scale, on schedule, and in compliance with national policy including Dubai 2030, UAE Industrial Strategy 2031 and Net Zero 2050.
why-elm.visionLede2: From Recarlo Milan to Bergamo Airport, our lineage proves LFAM in demanding real-world contexts. ELM brings that standard to Dubai.
why-elm.proofLede: The platforms we deploy have already been tested at landmark scale — LFAM using machines built to achieve some of the most ambitious structures in the world.
why-elm.recarloCopy: 2m × 3.9m polymer panels, 55 hours each Caracol Heron AM 400. Luxury retail finish applicable to UAE hospitality and premium retail.
why-elm.bergamoCopy: First 3D-printed building inside an operating airport 100 days concept to handover, 19-day print window. WASP Crane, lime-based CO₂-absorbing mortar.

meta.title: UAE Compliance
meta.description: Dubai 3D Printing Strategy 2030, UAE Industrial Strategy 2031, ICV, Net Zero 2050 and Dubai 2040 alignment.

header.title: UAE COMPLIANCE
header.subtitle: Dubai 2030 · UAE Industrial Strategy 2031 · ICV · Net Zero 2050 · Dubai 2040

uae-compliance.policyIntro: UAE government frameworks create direct, mandatory demand for exactly what ELM Media Design does.
uae-compliance.complianceLede: We can print service buildings on-site in a week. Urban furniture for smart-city programmes. Monuments and public art installations. Infrastructure elements that would typically take months through conventional supply chains — with demonstrable alignment to UAE Industrial Strategy 2031, ICV, Net Zero 2050 and Dubai 2040.

meta.title: Technologies
meta.description: Robotic concrete 3D printing, polymer LFAM and architectural manufacturing at commercial scale in Dubai, UAE.

header.title: TECHNOLOGIES
header.subtitle: Industrial 3D printing at architectural scale robotic concrete, polymer LFAM and end-to-end architectural manufacturing

technologies.introLede1: We run multi manufacturing capabilities. They share the same underlying logic — robotic precision, digital-first design, on-demand production — but they serve genuinely different project types.
technologies.introLede2: Technology partners include Caracol AM's Heron AM system and WASP's Crane system — proven from Recarlo Milan to Bergamo Airport.
technologies.statWasteDesc: Up to 60% less material waste vs conventional bespoke fabrication
technologies.statExtrusionDesc: Industrial polymer LFAM with full geometric freedom
technologies.statLeadDesc: Days to two weeks for bespoke architectural elements
technologies.statMandateDesc: 3D printing requirement for new buildings ELM is built to comply
technologies.sectorsSubtitle: Commercial additive manufacturing across the UAE built environment.

meta.title: Robotic Concrete
meta.description: Commercial robotic concrete 3D printing in Dubai structural and decorative LFAM without conventional formwork, up to 60% waste reduction.

header.title: ROBOTIC CONCRETE
header.subtitle: Layer-by-layer structural printing without conventional formwork

technology-robotic-concrete.introTitle: Structural and decorative concrete at architectural scale
technology-robotic-concrete.introLede1: Same principle, different material. The robot extrudes concrete layer by layer — structural or decorative, depending on what the project needs. No formwork means we can print on site, often in days rather than months, with up to 60% less material waste than conventional methods.
technology-robotic-concrete.introLede2: Our concrete systems use lime-based mortars that absorb CO₂ while they cure. These are measurable numbers we can provide per project, in a format that works for ESG reporting.
technology-robotic-concrete.benefitsLede: Eliminates conventional formwork for bespoke elements. Reduces material waste by up to 60% compared to standard methods. Enables on-site production with portable systems.
technology-robotic-concrete.benefit1: No moulds or formwork for complex geometry
technology-robotic-concrete.benefit2: On-site printing print where you build
technology-robotic-concrete.benefit5: Days to weeks vs 8–14 week conventional lead times
technology-robotic-concrete.appsLede: Programmes where geometry, programme speed or sustainability metrics drive procurement decisions.
technology-robotic-concrete.app5: Custom concrete formworks for iconic facades
technology-robotic-concrete.caseLede: A service and rest module for Milan Bergamo Airport concrete walls printed layer by layer inside a live airport logistics zone, with no conventional formwork. 100 days from first conversation to handover. 19 days to print.

meta.title: Polymer LFAM
meta.description: Industrial 6-axis polymer LFAM in Dubai facades, lighting, retail installations and architectural features with zero geometric constraints.

header.title: POLYMER LFAM
header.subtitle: Industrial 6-axis robotic extrusion for facades, lighting and retail installations

technology-polymer-lfam.introLede1: A multi-axis robotic arm extrudes polymer in precise layers — building architectural features, facade elements, furniture, branded installations and lighting fixtures straight from a digital file. No mould, no formwork, no geometric constraint.
technology-polymer-lfam.introLede2: We mostly use recycled and bio-based materials including rPET-G, recycled polypropylene and PLA bioplastics. Build volume scales with the project, from a single statement piece to an entire floor fit-out.
technology-polymer-lfam.benefitsLede: Design changes are file updates no new tooling, no programme delay. Near-zero off-cuts because the robot deposits exactly what's needed.
technology-polymer-lfam.benefit1: Zero geometric constraints any form, any scale
technology-polymer-lfam.benefit2: Recycled and bio-based materials as standard
technology-polymer-lfam.benefit3: High-finish quality for luxury hospitality and retail
technology-polymer-lfam.appsLede: Bespoke geometry, brand expression and programme speed define the brief.
technology-polymer-lfam.caseLede: Large architectural wall panels for the flagship Milan boutique 2m × 3.9m per panel, recycled PET-G with milling and painting finish. High-finish luxury fabrication for UAE hospitality and premium retail.

meta.title: Architectural Manufacturing
meta.description: End-to-end architectural manufacturing in Dubai digital design, LFAM fabrication and rapid site installation for landmark projects.

header.title: ARCHITECTURAL MANUFACTURING
header.subtitle: End-to-end custom fabrication from digital design to rapid site installation

technology-architectural-manufacturing.introLede1: Some projects don't fit a category. For those, we handle the whole thing — digital design, material selection, fabrication and on-site installation. Hospitality environments, luxury retail, public art, government landmarks.
technology-architectural-manufacturing.introLede2: We move from approved digital model to site-ready components in days, providing UAE-ready solutions for landmark hospitality, luxury retail, government and cultural projects.
technology-architectural-manufacturing.capLede: We measure success by components installed on site not renders in a portfolio. Every engagement follows a disciplined scope → fabricate → deliver path.
technology-architectural-manufacturing.cap1: Single point of accountability for LFAM programmes
technology-architectural-manufacturing.cap2: Concrete, polymer or hybrid fabrication routes
technology-architectural-manufacturing.processLede: The same engagement model applies across all architectural manufacturing programmes clear expectations from first briefing to capability profile access.
technology-architectural-manufacturing.process1: Consultation 30-minute technical briefing and feasibility review
technology-architectural-manufacturing.process2: Facility tour production capability and platform demonstration
technology-architectural-manufacturing.process3: RFQ response substantive quotation within 72 hours
technology-architectural-manufacturing.process4: Capability profile documentation for procurement submissions
technology-architectural-manufacturing.appsLede: For clients who need a single LFAM partner from concept to installation.
technology-architectural-manufacturing.app4: Museum and theme park immersive environments
technology-architectural-manufacturing.app5: Developer show villas and flagship facades

meta.title: Solutions
meta.description: LFAM solutions for property, infrastructure, hospitality, OOH media, industrial and cultural projects across the UAE.

header.title: SOLUTIONS
header.subtitle: Commercial LFAM tailored to industry verticals across the UAE built environment

solutions.introTitle: Built environment programmes, one LFAM partner
solutions.introLede1: We work across three primary verticals — real estate and construction, hospitality and leisure, government and infrastructure. Each has its own procurement dynamics, buyers and reasons to specify LFAM.
solutions.introLede2: From Dubai 2030 structural mandates to five-star hospitality interiors and sovereign infrastructure, we match technology route to vertical.
solutions.engageLede1: Every vertical starts with a 30-minute technical briefing. We scope feasibility, recommend concrete vs polymer vs hybrid fabrication, and document alignment with ICV, Dubai 2030 and Net Zero reporting where required.
solutions.engageLede2: Engagements include vertical-specific capability profiles for tender submissions, case studies from European LFAM programmes (Recarlo, Bergamo Airport), and a 72-hour RFQ response for qualified commercial enquiries.

meta.title: Property & Infrastructure
meta.description: On-site 3D printing, custom facades, smart-city installations and urban assets LFAM for property and infrastructure in the UAE.

header.title: PROPERTY & INFRASTRUCTURE
header.subtitle: On-site printing, custom facades and urban assets for developers and government

solution-property-infrastructure.introLede1: Dubai has mandated that 25% of all new buildings incorporate 3D printing by 2030. That is not a suggestion — it is a procurement obligation. Developers who have not started thinking about compliance will find themselves explaining that decision in tender submissions in about four years.
solution-property-infrastructure.introLede2: We print bespoke architectural features for show villas and flagship developments, custom concrete formworks faster and considerably cheaper than traditional mould-making, landscape elements, community seating, utility shelters and full-service buildings on-site in days. The range of what is buildable has changed significantly — and the developers who understand that early are the ones winning the design awards.
solution-property-infrastructure.appsLede: Property and infrastructure programmes where LFAM replaces long lead times and high tooling costs.
solution-property-infrastructure.app1: On-site printing of service buildings and modules
solution-property-infrastructure.app2: Custom facades and complex geometric formworks
solution-property-infrastructure.app5: Utility shelters and urban asset programmes
solution-property-infrastructure.app6: Developer show villas and flagship facades
solution-property-infrastructure.caseLede: A service module with concrete walls printed layer by layer inside a live airport logistics zone. 100 days from first conversation to handover proof that LFAM works in regulated infrastructure environments.

meta.title: Industrial, Mobility & Energy
meta.description: LFAM for automotive, aerospace, marine mock-ups, R&D prototyping and energy infrastructure in the UAE.

header.title: INDUSTRIAL, MOBILITY & ENERGY
header.subtitle: Automotive, aerospace, marine and energy infrastructure LFAM programmes

solution-industrial-mobility.introLede1: Industrial and mobility clients need high-precision mock-ups, marine-grade interior fit-outs and rapid R&D iteration without the tooling delays of conventional fabrication.
solution-industrial-mobility.introLede2: Polymer LFAM delivers complex geometry with recycled materials, while robotic concrete supports energy infrastructure in remote and Net Zero environments.
solution-industrial-mobility.benefitsLede: Advanced engineering where iteration speed, material efficiency and geometric freedom define procurement decisions.
solution-industrial-mobility.benefit1: Rapid R&D iteration without new tooling
solution-industrial-mobility.benefit4: Remote-site concrete structures for energy assets
solution-industrial-mobility.benefit6: Single partner from digital file to finished component
solution-industrial-mobility.appsLede: Programmes where LFAM accelerates iteration and reduces waste across mobility and energy sectors.
solution-industrial-mobility.app1: Automotive cabin mock-ups and interior fit-outs
solution-industrial-mobility.app4: R&D rapid prototyping for product development

meta.title: THE LOOP
meta.description: THE LOOP UAE's first robotic OOH media concept. Kinetic digital robotics with synchronized LED screens on 6-axis arms for high-footfall locations.

header.title: THE LOOP
header.subtitle: UAE's first robotic out-of-home media concept kinetic digital robotics for high-footfall locations

solution-ooh-the-loop.introLede1: THE LOOP is ELM's proprietary out-of-home media concept synchronized LED screens mounted on industrial 6-axis robotic arms. It combines ELM's heritage in urban advertising with advanced LFAM engineering.
solution-ooh-the-loop.introLede2: Deployable at Dubai's highest-footfall locations including Downtown, DIFC, Palm Jumeirah and City Walk. Portable units for exhibitions and event activations fully operational within 24 hours.
solution-ooh-the-loop.benefitsLede: Static billboards can't compete with kinetic, programmable media in premium locations. THE LOOP delivers motion, sync and spectacle with the deployment speed event and media buyers require.
solution-ooh-the-loop.benefit1: Synchronized LED screens on 6-axis industrial arms
solution-ooh-the-loop.benefit2: Prime Dubai corridors Downtown, DIFC, Palm Jumeirah
solution-ooh-the-loop.benefit3: Portable exhibition units operational in 24 hours
solution-ooh-the-loop.benefit5: Same LFAM engineering team as architectural programmes
solution-ooh-the-loop.benefit6: Media buying and location strategy expertise in-house
solution-ooh-the-loop.appsLede: High-impact, high-footfall environments across the UAE.
solution-ooh-the-loop.app1: Premium urban corridors and mixed-use districts
solution-ooh-the-loop.app3: Seasonal brand campaigns in prime OOH inventory
solution-ooh-the-loop.app4: Dubai 2040 active mobility and green corridor programmes
solution-ooh-the-loop.dualLede: THE LOOP exists because ELM's leadership combines urban advertising and advanced engineering. We understand media buying, location strategy and the robotic precision required to deliver kinetic OOH at commercial reliability.

meta.title: Hospitality & Leisure
meta.description: Luxury hospitality LFAM lobby centerpieces, high-end retail installations and bespoke interior fit-outs in Dubai and the UAE.

header.title: HOSPITALITY & LEISURE
header.subtitle: High-end commercial pieces, luxury retail and iconic lobby centerpieces

solution-hospitality-leisure.introLede1: In hospitality, the interior is the brand. A five-star property in Dubai is not competing on price — it is competing on the experience of walking through the door. That puts enormous pressure on design, and enormous pressure on whoever has to translate what architects dream up into reality.
solution-hospitality-leisure.introLede2: We remove that pressure: a custom lobby sculpture that would have taken weeks in conventional fabrication can come out of our facility in a fraction of that time. Late-stage design changes do not require new tooling — they require a file update. Because we work in recycled polymers with genuinely high finish quality, the output looks exactly like what was specified. For hospitality clients in the UAE, that combination is actually quite rare.
solution-hospitality-leisure.benefitsLede: Recycled polymers with genuinely high finish quality output that looks exactly like what was specified, at programme speed hospitality procurement demands.
solution-hospitality-leisure.benefit1: High-finish polymer for five-star and premium retail
solution-hospitality-leisure.benefit2: Design changes without mould or tooling delays
solution-hospitality-leisure.benefit3: Iconic lobby pieces at architectural scale
solution-hospitality-leisure.benefit4: End-of-life disassembly for interior refresh cycles
solution-hospitality-leisure.benefit5: Recarlo Milan-grade finishing and panel systems
solution-hospitality-leisure.appsLede: From flagship retail to resort landscapes polymer LFAM for environments where brand expression and schedule are non-negotiable.
solution-hospitality-leisure.app1: Iconic lobby centerpieces and feature walls
solution-hospitality-leisure.app3: F&B environments and branded dining spaces
solution-hospitality-leisure.app4: Hotel corridor and suite fit-out elements
solution-hospitality-leisure.app6: End-of-life disassembly for interior refresh cycles
solution-hospitality-leisure.caseLede: 2m × 3.9m architectural wall panels with milling and painting finish. High-finish luxury fabrication directly applicable to UAE five-star hospitality and premium retail.

header.title: CREATIVE & CULTURE
header.subtitle: Public art, immersive environments and advanced facade systems

solution-creative-culture.introLede1: ELM enables large-scale public art and immersive environments for museums and theme parks. Our technology supports advanced facade systems, complex canopies and scenic event productions that conventional methods struggle to deliver economically.
solution-creative-culture.introLede2: From government monuments to theme park scenography LFAM gives curators and creative directors forms that were previously considered impossible at programme speed.
solution-creative-culture.benefitsLede: Geometry, narrative and public impact define the brief LFAM delivers without the cost and schedule penalties of bespoke conventional fabrication.
solution-creative-culture.benefit3: Complex canopies and advanced facade systems
solution-creative-culture.benefit4: Rapid iteration for creative director sign-off
solution-creative-culture.benefit5: Concrete and polymer routes under one partner

meta.title: Projects
meta.description: LFAM portfolio Recarlo Milan, Bergamo Airport and commercial large-format additive manufacturing case studies.

header.title: PROJECTS
header.subtitle: Commercial LFAM case studies from landmark retail to regulated airport infrastructure

projects.portfolioLede: The platforms we deploy have already been tested at landmark scale — LFAM using machines built to achieve some of the most ambitious structures in the world.

meta.title: Bergamo Airport
meta.description: Case study: first 3D-printed building inside an operating airport robotic concrete LFAM service module at Milan Bergamo, delivered by WASP.

header.title: BERGAMO AIRPORT
header.subtitle: Robotic concrete LFAM inside a live airport logistics zone

project-bergamo-airport.projectLede1: A service and rest module for Milan Bergamo Airport concrete walls printed layer by layer inside a live airport logistics zone, with no conventional formwork.
project-bergamo-airport.projectLede2: Delivered by WASP (Italy) for SACBO Airport Authority. The first 3D-printed building constructed inside an operating airport. If it works there, it works in the UAE's most regulated environments.
project-bergamo-airport.challengeCopy: Deliver a functional service building inside an active airport environment meeting strict regulatory requirements while eliminating conventional formwork and reducing programme time.
project-bergamo-airport.outcomeCopy: Full handover in 100 days from first conversation. 19-day print window. Lime-based mortar absorbs CO₂ during curing lower lifecycle carbon than standard cement. Direct proof point for UAE government and infrastructure procurement.

meta.title: Recarlo Milan
meta.description: Case study: large-format polymer LFAM wall panels for Recarlo flagship boutique, Milan delivered by Caracol AM Heron AM 400.

header.title: RECARLO MILAN
header.subtitle: Luxury retail LFAM architectural wall panels at flagship scale

project-recarlo-milan.projectLede1: Large architectural wall panels for the flagship Milan store designed as a story-telling surface carrying the brand's identity through form, texture and colour.
project-recarlo-milan.projectLede2: Delivered by Caracol AM (Italy) using the Heron AM 400 platform. High-finish luxury fabrication at a quality level directly applicable to UAE five-star hospitality and premium retail.
project-recarlo-milan.challengeCopy: Create a bespoke architectural surface at luxury retail finish standard complex geometry, brand narrative and high visual impact without conventional mould tooling delays.
project-recarlo-milan.outcomeCopy: Large-format panels produced via robotic polymer extrusion with post-process milling and paint finish. Proof that LFAM delivers five-star hospitality and premium retail quality at architectural scale.

solutionsCards.title: Industry Verticals
solutionsCards.lede: Tailored LFAM programmes across the UAE built environment from on-site concrete to kinetic OOH and luxury hospitality.
solutionsCards.card1Copy: On-site printing, facades and urban assets for property developers and infrastructure programmes.
solutionsCards.card2Copy: Automotive, aerospace and energy applications requiring large-format precision fabrication.
solutionsCards.card3Copy: Kinetic digital robotics synchronized LED screens on 6-axis arms for high-footfall OOH deployment.
solutionsCards.card4Copy: Luxury retail, lobby fit-outs and experiential spaces with bespoke LFAM components.
solutionsCards.card5Copy: Public art, cultural landmarks and immersive environments with expressive geometry.

sectorsGrid.defaultSubtitle: Commercial additive manufacturing across the UAE built environment.

alsoExplore.defaultSubtitle: More ways to see how ELM delivers LFAM in the UAE

policyMandates.m1Copy: 25% of new buildings by 2030. That's the mandate, in writing. We're the partner who makes compliance straightforward.
policyMandates.m2Copy: The ICV programme classifies LFAM as advanced manufacturing. ELM is structured to get ICV certified and registered on government procurement portals.
policyMandates.m3Copy: Local advanced manufacturing pathway — ICV certification in progress for state tenders
policyMandates.m4Copy: Polymer LFAM produces up to 60% less waste. Lime-based mortars absorb CO₂ while they cure — measurable per project for ESG reporting.
policyMandates.m5Copy: Green corridors and high-quality urban spaces need bespoke outdoor structures, urban furniture and architectural elements at Dubai's programme pace.

lfamComparison.title: Why large-format additive manufacturing?
lfamComparison.lede: On every metric that actually matters in a procurement decision, LFAM wins — often by a significant margin. Not because it is new. Because it is better.
lfamComparison.leadTimeElm: Days to 2 weeks, depending on scope
lfamComparison.wasteElm: Near-zero. The robot deposits exactly what's needed
lfamComparison.geometryOld: Hard limits set by moulds and formwork
lfamComparison.geometryElm: No limits. Any shape, any scale
lfamComparison.changesElm: It's a file update. No extra cost
lfamComparison.sustainabilityOld: High virgin material and concrete consumption
lfamComparison.onsiteElm: Yes — portable systems, print where you build
lfamComparison.customisationOld: Mass production logic applies to everything
lfamComparison.customisationElm: Fully bespoke per project, every time

techProcess.title: From digital file to site installation
techProcess.lede: Every technology route follows the same commercial discipline scope, fabricate, deliver with transparent milestones and UAE compliance documentation.
techProcess.step1Copy: Feasibility review, parametric modelling, material selection and production-ready files.
techProcess.step2Copy: Layer-by-layer concrete or polymer deposition with QC, finishing and programme reporting.
techProcess.step3Copy: Installation support, programme handover and compliance-ready documentation.

techSpecCards.label: AT A GLANCE
techSpecCards.title: Technology specifications
techSpecCards.lede: Material, process and scale three LFAM routes compared side by side for procurement and design teams.
techSpecCards.card1Blurb: Same principle, different material — structural or decorative concrete extruded on-site, often in days, with up to 60% less waste.
techSpecCards.card2Blurb: Multi-axis extrusion for facades, furniture and branded installations — recycled polymers, no mould or geometric constraint.
techSpecCards.card3Blurb: End-to-end digital design, material selection, fabrication and on-site installation for projects that don't fit a category.

techStickyStack.label: DEEP DIVE
techStickyStack.title: Explore Each Technology
techStickyStack.lede: Three manufacturing routes on one LFAM platform scroll through capabilities, then open the dedicated technology page for specs and engagement.
techStickyStack.card1Copy: Structural printing for buildings, infrastructure and regulated environments no conventional formwork for bespoke geometry.
techStickyStack.card2Copy: 6-axis robotic extrusion for facades, retail, hospitality and branded environments complex forms without mould tooling.
techStickyStack.card3Copy: End-to-end design-to-site delivery for landmark hospitality, retail and public projects one team from file to installation.
